step_text: Open the daily worklist and sort transactions by submission time.
Verify the requester's department code before approving the transaction.
Check that the attached job aid matches the current fiscal year.
Route any exception over the approval threshold to the secondary approver.
Confirm the vendor is on the approved list before releasing the order.
Record the approval in the tracker with a timestamp.
For terminations, confirm the final-pay checklist is complete.
Escalate anything still pending after three business days.
Notify the department contact once the transaction posts.
File the supporting documents in the shared drive folder.
